mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_info (cart_id, user_id, product_id, quantity, create_time, update_time) VALUES (UUID(), #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_info SET quantity = #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} LIMIT 1
